1127.reason: [This is incorrect: when encountering 'ident(...)', it should parse a function call as part of an expression, but parseExp() will try to parse LVal first and fail. Also, after parsing the function call expression, it must consume the semicolon, but the current logic doesn't properly handle the full expression structure including the function call syntax.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This is incorrect: when encountering 'ident(...)', it should parse a function call as part of an expression, but parseExp() will try to parse LVal first and fail. Also, after parsing the function call expression, it must consume the semicolon, but the current logic doesn't properly handle the full expression structure including the function call syntax.]

394.reason: [Incorrectly appends the next character instead of the current '|' character. Should append tempChar first like the '&' case does. This causes wrong token construction and potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when curPos is at end of string.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrectly appends the next character instead of the current '|' character. Should append tempChar first like the '&' case does. This causes wrong token construction and potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when curPos is at end of string.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [This is incorrect: it should append tempChar (the current '|') first, not source.charAt(curPos) which is the next character. This causes wrong token construction and potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when curPos is at end of string.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [This line accesses source.charAt(curPos) without first checking if curPos < source.length(), which can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when curPos is at the end of the string]
